response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with deep technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and DLang/Linux ecosystems, plus relevant open-source platform ownership (GISCollective) and Linux affinity. However, the role demands executive-level leadership with formal team management and German C1 — the resume shows individual contributor roles (Staff/Senior SWE) without documented people-leadership scope, and German is only Basic, which is a hard blocker against the C1 requirement.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux background with founder-level ownership of GISCollective platform
Senior engineering experience at top-tier companies (Stripe, Shopify) across full stack and architecture
Strong teaching/mentoring footprint via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the mandatory C1 requirement
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal team-lead role with direct reports shown
Limited evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, and Python proficiency

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership track record
